nasb.text: So all the people went to Gilgal, and there they made Saul king before the Lord in Gilgal. There they also offered sacrifices of peace offerings before the Lord; and there Saul and all the men of Israel rejoiced greatly.

esv.text: So all the people went to Gilgal, and there they made Saul king before the Lord in Gilgal. There they sacrificed peace offerings before the Lord, and there Saul and all the men of Israel rejoiced greatly.

cnv.text: 眾民就都到吉甲去，在那裡在耶和華面前立掃羅為王，又在那裡在耶和華面前獻平安祭。掃羅和以色列眾民都在那裡，非常歡喜。

ccb.text: 于是，他们来到吉甲，在耶和华面前立扫罗为王，又向耶和华献上平安祭。扫罗和全体以色列人都非常欢喜。
